title: Marketplace Manager - Cleartrip - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Cleartrip - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cleartrip family as a Marketplace Manager in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cleartrip:
Cleartrip is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip!
